final:
module RefModule(  
    input clk,  
    input rst,  
    input [1:0] speed_input,  
    output reg [1:0] current_speed  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (rst)  
            current_speed <= 2'b00; // Off  
        else  
            current_speed <= speed_input;  
    end  
endmodule
